title: Assertion failure on invalid wire width ranges

features.name: wire with negative range index
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration where the range left bound is a negative integer, producing an invalid or unusual width specification that the frontend must validate

features.name: ascending range with negative left bound
features.description: Code should include a net or variable declaration with an ascending range (left < right) where the left bound is negative, exercising edge cases in range validation logic
